query: SELECT 'equipment' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE equip_id LIKE 'eq-177%' OR name LIKE 'ŠŞČŔęŽ%' UNION ALL SELECT 'skill' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM game_skill_catalog WHERE name LIKE 'ŠŞČŔęŽ%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT 'equipment' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE equip_id LIKE 'eq-177%' OR name LIKE 'ŠŞČŔęŽ%' UNION ALL SELECT 'skill' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM game_skill_catalog WHERE name LIKE 'ŠŞČŔęŽ%';
